gold_change_reason: Added logic to read compound-specific bounds from model.compound_bounds when available, falling back to default (-50,50) otherwise. This satisfies the C-axis operator requirement.
covered_requirements: Increase computational complexity by requiring the function to read compound-specific bounds from the model instead of using hardcoded defaults.
implementation_notes: Modified the loop that defines xij variables to check for compound_bounds attribute and use per-compound bounds if present.
Fallback to default (-50,50) when compound_bounds is missing or compound not in dictionary.
Preserved original behavior for all other aspects.
